reviews.comment:
Desastroso están arreglando toda la estación y hay que esperar mucho para ser atendido, sin sistema, prefería que estuviera cerrado harían todo más rápido.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. They're fixing the whole station and you have to wait a long time to be served. There's no system; I'd prefer it to be closed, they'd do everything faster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhc01pUTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Solo de paso estuve.

(Translated by Google)
I was just passing through.

reviewReply.comment: Estimado Jonatan ¡Muchas gracias por su valoración! Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCOE9QUnFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima atención de parte del playero sin ganas le doy mi dni para los puntos y a lo último me dice no no hay sistema nunca me dijo al principio ni cargaba para eso.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendant, I give him my ID for the points and at the end he tells me no, there is no system, he never told me at the beginning nor did he charge for that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbjdhY1p3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hace dos semanas q no tienen "sistema " y no te dan tickets ni suman puntos y menos cobran con tarjetas, solo efectivo

(Translated by Google)
They haven't had a "system" for two weeks now, and they don't give you tickets or award points, and they certainly don't accept cards, only cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtNzdPYWxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion ; pero No practico e incomodo para uno ; dado que desde hace mas tres semanas se a vuelto comun y corriente ; que se queden por la mañana , Sin Sistema y solo se atienda para el pago con Efectivo y sin ofrecer ticket o factura.

(Translated by Google)
Good service; but not practical and inconvenient for one; given that for more than three weeks it has become commonplace; that they are left in the morning, without a system and only attend to the payment with cash and without offering a ticket or invoice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtcjgyX0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo el fin de semana largo no funcionaba la aplicación de YPF y allí, ni siquiera hacían el descuento de socios de A.C.A.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF app was down all weekend, and they weren't even offering the A.C.A. member discount.

reviews.comment:
PORQUE HACE UNA SEMANA DICEN QUE NO HAY SISTEMA ??? Tanto pueden tardar en arreglar eso ..... pero tarjeta si recibe ... RARO TODO

(Translated by Google)
WHY HAVE THEY BEEN SAYING THE SYSTEM IS DOWN FOR A WEEK??? How long can it take them to fix that... but the card is working... IT'S ALL SO STRANGE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención,.hay un playero de anteojos que no te carga los puntos en la tarjeta YPF..cuando le reclamas te inventa cualquier cosa...otro día solicite usar la aspiradora para limpiar un móvil policial, PAGANDO obvio,me dijeron que hable con el encargado,dueño o el presidente..después me dijeron que no..gracias

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service. There's a gas station attendant with glasses who won't add points to your YPF card. When you complain, he makes up any excuse. Another day I asked to use the vacuum cleaner to clean a police car, paying of course, and they told me to speak to the manager, owner, or president. Then they told me no. Thanks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtM3JiSnZnRRAB
